label: stack-scripts-lifecycle
title: Stack lifecycle scripts: syntax, password rotation, secrets reuse, orchestrator
description: Test proof for the new stack lifecycle scripts (stack.sh, stack_destroy.sh, stack_start.sh, stack_stop.sh, stack_restart.sh, stack_seed.sh) and supporting modules (stack_lifecycle.sh, generate_secrets.sh --reuse-admin, seed_password_rotation.py --no-admin-rotate).

test_suites.name: stack-syntax-validation
test_suites.description: Shell syntax validation for all 8 new/modified scripts

test_suites.name: password-rotation
test_suites.description: Python module tests for seed_password_rotation.py: imports, admin var classification, skip_admin behavior, password generation

test_suites.name: secrets-reuse-admin
test_suites.description: generate_secrets.sh --reuse-admin: admin passwords preserved, service passwords rotated

test_suites.name: env-password-rotation
test_suites.description: seed_password_rotation.py --no-admin-rotate: admin passwords unchanged, service passwords rotated, non-password vars unchanged

test_suites.name: stack-lifecycle-helpers
test_suites.description: stack_lifecycle.sh helper tests: admin var classification, env suffix derivation, project prefix derivation, stateful volume list

test_suites.name: stack-orchestrator
test_suites.description: stack.sh orchestrator: help output completeness, argument validation, child script existence

test_suites.name: docs-consistency
test_suites.description: Documentation consistency: key docs reference stack.sh, lifecycle scripts listed, password policy documented
